name: Oven Salmon Cakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 3/4 cup cracker crumbs, egg, parsley, onion, milk, pepper, and Worcestershire sauce.
2. Add salmon and cheese; mix until well combined.
3. Shape the mixture into 4 patties.
4. Mix the remaining butter with the extra cracker crumbs.
5. Coat the patties evenly with the butter-cracker mixture.
6. Place the patties on an ungreased baking sheet.
7. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 minutes.
Best to you, Lisa
